evidence.quote: We synthesized our own ECH Sepharose 4B by conjugating 6-Aminohexanoic acid (Sigma) to cyanogen bromide (CNBr)-activated Sepharose 4B
Each drug was dissolved in 50% DMF/EtOH and added to the conditioned beads in the presence of 0.1 M 1-ethyl-3-(3-dimethylaminopropyl) carbodiimide (EDC) and allowed to react overnight at 4 °C
Conjugation of the drugs to the 'homemade' ECH Sepharose 4B were performed according to protocol described by Duncan et al. [10]

issues.claim: chose to use CNBr-activated Sepharose 4B... to conjugate 9 kinase inhibitors
issues.reason: Text specifies drugs were conjugated to 'homemade ECH Sepharose 4B' which was synthesized from CNBr beads, not directly to CNBr beads.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Specify that ECH Sepharose 4B was synthesized from CNBr-activated Sepharose 4B first, then drugs were conjugated to the ECH beads.
